creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Hello Chris.

As requested.
This is on FreeBSD 9.0-STABLE (FreeBSD 9.0-STABLE #100 r235021: Fri May
 4 20:57:10 CEST 2012).

On FreeBSD 10-CUR, this seems not to be an issue.


[...]

root@munin:/root # portmaster graphics/gdal

===>>> Port directory: /usr/ports/graphics/gdal

===>>> Gathering distinfo list for installed ports

===>>> Launching 'make checksum' for graphics/gdal in background
===>>> Gathering dependency list for graphics/gdal from ports
===>>> Initial dependency check complete for graphics/gdal

===>>> Starting build for graphics/gdal <<<===

===>>> All dependencies are up to date

===>  Cleaning for gdal-1.8.1_4

===>  License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
===>  Found saved configuration for gdal-1.8.1_3
===>  Extracting for gdal-1.8.1_4
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for gdal-1.8.1.tar.gz.
===>  Patching for gdal-1.8.1_4
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for gdal-1.8.1_4
sed: 1: " s,%%MAKE_ENV%%,TMPDIR= ...": bad flag in substitute command: '-'
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/gdal.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/gdal.

===>>> make failed for graphics/gdal
===>>> Aborting update

Terminated

===>>> You can restart from the point of failure with this command line:
       portmaster <flags> graphics/gdal

root@munin:/root # make -C /usr/ports/graphics/gdal -V MAKE_ENV
SHELL=/bin/sh NO_LINT=YES ADDR2LINE="/usr/local/bin/addr2line"
AR="/usr/local/bin/ar" AS="/usr/local/bin/as"
CPPFILT="/usr/local/bin/c++filt" GPROF="/usr/local/bin/gprof"
LD="/usr/local/bin/ld" NM="/usr/local/bin/nm"
OBJCOPY="/usr/local/bin/objcopy" OBJDUMP="/usr/local/bin/objdump"
RANLIB="/usr/local/bin/ranlib" READELF="/usr/local/bin/readelf"
SIZE="/usr/local/bin/size" STRINGS="/usr/local/bin/strings"
LIBTOOL=/usr/local/bin/libtool  LIBTOOLIZE=/usr/local/bin/libtoolize
LIBTOOL_LIBEXECDIR=/usr/local/libexec/libtool
LIBTOOL_SHAREDIR=/usr/local/share/libtool
LIBTOOL_M4=/usr/local/share/aclocal/libtool.m4
LTMAIN=/usr/local/share/libtool/config/ltmain.sh PREFIX=/usr/local
LOCALBASE=/usr/local  MOTIFLIB="-L/usr/local/lib -lXm -lXp"
LIBDIR="/usr/lib"  CC="gcc46" CFLAGS="-O2 -pipe -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing
-pipe -O3 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -march=native
-Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46"  CPP="cpp46"
CPPFLAGS="-I/usr/local/include"  LDFLAGS=" -L/usr/local
-Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -L/usr/local/lib"  CXX="g++46"
CXXFLAGS="-O2 -pipe -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -O3 -pipe
-fno-strict-aliasing -march=native -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46"
MANPREFIX="/usr/local" BSD_INSTALL_PROGRAM="install  -s -o root -g wheel
-m 555"  BSD_INSTALL_LIB="install  -s -o root -g wheel -m 444"
BSD_INSTALL_SCRIPT="install  -o root -g wheel -m 555"
BSD_INSTALL_DATA="install  -o root -g wheel -m 444"
BSD_INSTALL_MAN="install  -o root -g wheel -m 444"
